name: Local ROM RL profile: gba_strategy_or_tactics
capability_target: pixel/control RL, exploration, planning, and delayed reward using user-owned local game assets.

input_contract.rom_resolution: runtime resolves ignored ROM path from reports/local_rom_registry.json

output_contract.residuals: stalls, deaths, loops, invalid actions, wrapper failures

smoke_steps: resolve user-supplied ROM from ignored local registry
record observation shape and shaped reward hooks
contamination_policy: No ROM bytes or hashes are tracked in cards; only ignored local registry resolves private assets.
regression_policy: Promote stable wrapper tasks to regression after deterministic smoke and shaped reward validation.

permission_envelope.memory: benchmark-local metadata and task context only
permission_envelope.tools: local loaders, scorers, sandboxes, and report writers
permission_envelope.network: forbidden during scoring; catalog import only through license-gated source tools

next_step: No matching local ROM found yet. If you own one, place it under data/local_roms, set SPARKSTREAM_ROM_ROOTS, or pass --rom-root.
